name: dictex-monorepo
description: DicTeX monorepo: consumer dictation app, DicTeX Lab tooling app, Python STT engine, shared TS packages

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/dictex && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/lab
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/dictex && npm run build --workspace apps/lab
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test apps/dictex/src/main/normalizationPolicy.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/settings.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/sttWorkerClient.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/sttWorkerManager.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/dictationFlow.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/candidateCatalog.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/promptVariants.test.ts packages/shared/src/commands.test.ts packages/shared/src/latex.test.ts packages/shared/src/normalizer.test.ts packages/shared/src/datasetExport.test.ts packages/shared/src/sttEngine.test.ts packages/shared/src/textDiff.test.ts packages/shared/src/localEvents.test.ts packages/shared/src/benchmarkRuns.test.ts
